seoTitle: Connect GoDaddy Domain to HubSpot: Setup Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to point a GoDaddy-hosted domain or subdomain at HubSpot by matching A and CNAME DNS records and verifying SSL activation.
intro: If your domain is registered with GoDaddy, connecting it to HubSpot means updating your DNS zone there while HubSpot handles hosting and SSL. This guide walks through starting the domain wizard in HubSpot, generating the correct DNS values, and entering them inside GoDaddy's control panel. It finishes with verifying propagation so your site goes live without broken links.

steps.heading: Open Domains & URLs in HubSpot
steps.body: Go to Settings, then Content, and select the Domains & URLs directory.

steps.heading: Start the connection wizard
steps.body: Click Connect hosting domain to launch the setup screen for your GoDaddy-hosted domain.

steps.heading: Enter your subdomain and content types
steps.body: Specify your subdomain prefix and assign the content types, like website or landing pages, this domain will serve.

steps.heading: Copy your DNS values
steps.body: Review the CNAME values or A record IPs HubSpot generates for your setup.

steps.heading: Update DNS in GoDaddy
steps.body: Log into your GoDaddy Domain Portfolio dashboard and input the new values while removing any conflicting legacy records.

steps.heading: Verify the connection
steps.body: Return to HubSpot to run a live verification check and confirm SSL provisioning completes.

faq.question: Do I manage DNS in HubSpot or GoDaddy?
faq.answer: DNS records still live in GoDaddy's control panel; HubSpot only generates the values you need to enter there.

faq.question: Will my GoDaddy domain get SSL automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, once verification completes, HubSpot handles automatic SSL certificate provisioning for the connected domain.

faq.question: What DNS record type do I need for a subdomain?
faq.answer: Subdomains like www or blog typically use a CNAME record pointing to HubSpot's servers.

faq.question: How can I check if my domain propagated correctly?
faq.answer: HubSpot's Domain Verification dashboard shows live propagation status so you can confirm the connection is complete.
